text:
Market today: Mixed signals with JPMorgan warning of a summer swoon, but Morgan Stanley sees AI hyperscalers rallying. The mood is cautious but with potential for specific tech pockets. The real driver for your tech/chip names is AI, but watch for broader market weakness.

Your holdings: SOXL is your biggest concern, down over 23% and leveraged; margin amplifies this. SPAL, a brand-new, very volatile leveraged ETF, is also down. PTNM is a tiny spec down over 15%.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged ETFs (SOXL, SPAL) for sharp moves. Also, watch SMH for potential accumulation if the market holds up.

Bottom line: Aggressively manage leveraged positions and stay selective on new tech entries given mixed market signals.
plays: SOXL: Respect the stop at 200 or consider trimming due to leverage and decay, especially with a 23% loss.
SPAL: Monitor closely. This new leveraged ETF moves fast; consider tightening your stop at 21.38.
SMH: Consider adding if it hits the scanner's 589.88-587.25 entry range, with a stop at 580.66, aligning with a potential AI rally.
